expertQuote.quote: HydraFacial is one of the best return-on-investment purchases for a salon. Clients see results immediately and return regularly – that means guaranteed revenue.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

featureRows.headline: Why choose a multifunctional hydrofacial device?
featureRows.subtitle: Comprehensive facial cleansing and treatment with a single device

features.title: Every treatment in a single device
features.description: No need to buy separate hydrodermabrasion, ultrasound, and RF devices. Multifunctional hydrofacial machines offer 6–12 functions in a single compact unit.
features.highlight: One device, one learning curve, endless possibilities.

features.title: Fast, effective treatment protocols
features.description: 30–45 minute comprehensive treatments in a single session. The client sees and feels results immediately – from the very first appointment.
features.highlight: You can serve up to 8–10 clients per day with the device.

features.title: Affordable professional technology
features.description: Skinlab hydrofacial devices offer the same quality at a fraction of the price that major brands charge millions for. With a 2-year warranty and Hungarian service support.
features.highlight: Professional quality at an affordable price – with a 2-year warranty.

training.headline: Professional device operator training
training.intro: Personal training and official device operator certification are available for all our hydrofacial devices.

faq.question: What skin types is HydraFacial treatment suitable for?
faq.answer: HydraFacial is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. The treatment intensity can be customized for each individual.

faq.question: How many treatments can be performed per day?
faq.answer: A single treatment takes approximately 30–45 minutes, so you can serve up to 8–10 clients per day.

faq.question: What consumables are required?
faq.answer: The device requires special serums and solutions, which we provide to our clients at discounted prices.
